response.justification: Strong senior generalist with 10+ years of production engineering across TypeScript/Node.js, cloud, and full-stack work, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in core role requirements: no explicit production GenAI/LLM shipping history, no clear evidence of RAG/vector database experience, and no customer-facing technical discovery leadership. Could be a fit if recent re:cinq AI work has substance, warranting a screening conversation.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js experience and polyglot full-stack background spanning 10+ years
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of production AI/GenAI delivery — AI exposure appears recent and limited
RAG, vector databases, and LLM evaluation/observability pipelines are not mentioned anywhere
No clear customer-facing or forward-deployed consulting experience leading discovery with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
